title: Infundere
body:
![Infundere Logo](https://share.problemadmin.de/generated/captures/thumbs/c7/c721338f2c6144e8afa8ed41d87cd616.png)
 

**DISCLAIMER** - Please note that this mod is currently in the pre-alpha state. As such, it's important to be aware that bugs and errors might arise during use. Your assistance in improving the mod's stability is highly valued – kindly report any encountered issues through the provided issue tracker.


**Ore Generation from Thin Air!** Infundere, specially designed for Minecraft sky block enthusiasts, draws inspiration from renowned mods like [Sky Resources 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sky-resources) and [Ex Nihilo](https://modrinth.com/mod/ex-nihilo-sequentia), promising an unparalleled ore generation experience.


Current versions include:  
**Ore Infuser** - A machine generating ores from an item and a block ingredient.  
![Ore Infuser Recipe](https://share.problemadmin.de/generated/captures/thumbs/cc/cc361e6503d54ca9ac921951856ae49d.png)

**Breacer** - A machine which breaks and places blocks in front. Perfect for ore infuser automation.
